summaries.theme_name: Poor Customer Support and Technical Issues
actionable_ideas: Improve the customer support system to address user concerns promptly and fairly, especially for long-standing customers
Enhance the app's technical stability to prevent issues like exchange connectivity problems, failed orders, and OTP verification failures
Provide more transparent and user-friendly features, such as live profit/loss tracking and clear fee disclosures, to improve the overall user experience
